  createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition

} from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-request.mjs";
import {
  createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord
} from "../src/shared/agent-a-write-admission.mjs";

const root = resolve(fileURLToPath(new URL("..", import.meta.url)));
const modulePath = join(root, "src/shared/governed-write-transaction.mjs");

const hashA = `sha256:${"a".repeat(64)}`;
const hashB = `sha256:${"b".repeat(64)}`;
const hashC = `sha256:${"c".repeat(64)}`;
const hashD = `sha256:${"d".repeat(64)}`;

const publicRecordKeys = [
  "transactionId",
  "writeIntentId",
  "promotionRequestId",

];

const falseAuthorityFlags = {
  adjacentFileWriteAllowed: false,
  multiFileWriteAllowed: false,
  packageAliasWriteAllowed: false,
  uncontrolledPackageWriteAllowed: false,
  runtimeDispatchAllowed: false,
  publicationAllowed: false,
  callerRecoveryRecordAllowed: false
};

const failureReasonVocabulary = [
  "missing-admission-record",
  "malformed-admission-record",
  "admission-not-admitted",
  "missing-package-record",

  "hostile-caller-object"
];

const admissionAuthorityFlags = {
  candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource: true,
  canonicalSourceMutationAllowed: false,
  canonicalMutationAllowed: false,
  candidatePromotionAuthorized: false,
  externalEditAdoptionAllowed: false,
  governedImportRequired: true,
  aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted: false,
  rawCandidateContentRetained: false,
  filesystemPathRetained: false
};

function acceptedEvidence(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
    agentRole: "agent-a",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
    contentFingerprint: hashC,
    boundedEvidence: "present",
    sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary",
    ...overrides
  };
}

function acceptedCandidate(order = 4, evidenceOverrides = {}) {
  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
    acceptedEvidence(evidenceOverrides),
    order
  );
}

function readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder = 2) {
  return createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);
}

function readyPromotionRequest(
  candidateOrder = 4,
  readinessOrder = 2,
  requestOrder = 7
) {
  const candidate = acceptedCandidate(candidateOrder);
  const readiness = readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);

  return createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(candidate, readiness, requestOrder);
}

function invocationEvidence(request, overrides = {}) {
  const authorityFlags = {
    ...request.authorityFlags
  };

  return {
    governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
    invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
    mutationMode: "non-mutating",
    effect: "status-only",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    operatorReviewRequired: true,
    promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
    promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
    candidateId: request.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
    candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function realAdmittedRecord(admissionOrder = 7, overrides = {}) {
  const request = readyPromotionRequest(4, 2, 7);
  const admission = createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
    request,
    invocationEvidence(request),
    admissionOrder
  );

  assert.equal(admission.admissionState, "admitted");
  assert.deepEqual(admission.admissionBlockedReasons, []);

  return {
    ...admission,
    authorityFlags: {
      ...admission.authorityFlags
    },
    admissionBlockedReasons: [...admission.admissionBlockedReasons],
    ...overrides
  };
}

function admittedRecord(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    writeIntentId: "agent-a-write-intent:0007",
    promotionRequestId: "agent-a-promotion-request:0007",
    admissionState: "admitted",
    writeIntentStatus: "intent-recorded",
    reviewStatus: "pending-review",
    admissionBlockedReasons: [],
    candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
    authorityFlags: admissionAuthorityFlags,
    ...admissionAuthorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

      {

        pattern: /secondDuplicateDeniedPatternProbe/u

      }
    ],
    addError(ruleId, message, evidence = {}) {
      duplicateErrors.push(message);
      duplicateDiagnostics.push({ ruleId, message, evidence });
    }
  });

  for (const expectedError of [
    "Duplicate validator required file entry: src/shared/duplicate-required-entry.mjs",
    "Duplicate governed boundary marker file entry: src/shared/duplicate-marker-entry.mjs",
    "Duplicate governed authority-field scan file entry: src/shared/duplicate-authority-field-scan-entry.mjs",
    "Duplicate denied source pattern ID: K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-DENIED-PATTERN-PROBE",
    "Duplicate confined vocabulary group rule ID: K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-CONFINEMENT-GROUP-PROBE"
  ]) {
    assert.equal(duplicateErrors.includes(expectedError), true, duplicateErrors.join("\n"));
  }

  for (const expectedRuleId of [
    "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-REQUIRED-FILE",
    "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-BOUNDARY-MARKER",
    "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-AUTHORITY-FIELD-SCAN-FILE",
    "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-DENIED-SOURCE-PATTERN-ID",
    "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-CONFINED-VOCABULARY-GROUP-ID"
  ]) {
    assert.equal(
      duplicateDiagnostics.some((diagnostic) => diagnostic.ruleId === expectedRuleId),
      true,
      JSON.stringify(duplicateDiagnostics, null, 2)
    );
  }
}

]);

const RAW_FIELD_SET = new Set(RAW_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts));
const SPOOF_FIELD_SET = new Set(SPOOF_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts));
const CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_SET = Object.freeze(
  DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_SET = Object.freeze(
  DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const ADMISSION_FLAG_SET = new Set(
  ADMISSION_FLAG_ENTRIES.map(([field]) => normalizeFieldKey(field))
);
const TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET = new Set(
  TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_NAMES.map(normalizeFieldKey)
);

function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (
    !value ||
    (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function") ||
    Object.isFrozen(value)
  ) {
    return value;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  seen.add(value);

  for (const descriptor of Object.values(Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value))) {
    if ("value" in descriptor) {
      deepFreeze(descriptor.value, seen);
    }
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

function normalizedParts(parts) {
  return normalizeFieldKey(parts.join(""));
}

function normalizeFieldKey(field) {
  return typeof field === "string"
    ? field.replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/giu, "").toLowerCase()
    : "";
}

function fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, substrings) {
  return substrings.some((substring) => fieldKey.includes(substring));
}

function safeIsProxy(value) {
  try {
    return nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value);
  } catch {
    return true;
  }
}

function safeArrayIsArray(value) {
  try {
    return Array.isArray(value);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function objectInspectionFailed(value) {
  try {
    Array.isArray(value);
    Object.getPrototypeOf(value);
    return false;
  } catch {
    return true;
  }
}

function isPlainRecord(value) {
  if (
    !value ||
    typeof value !== "object" ||
    safeIsProxy(value) ||
    safeArrayIsArray(value)
  ) {
    return false;
  }

  try {
    const prototype = Object.getPrototypeOf(value);

    return prototype === Object.prototype || prototype === null;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return (
    typeof descriptor?.get === "function" ||
    typeof descriptor?.set === "function"
  );
}

function descriptorValue(descriptors, field) {
  const descriptor = descriptors[field];

  if (!descriptor || hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor)) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return descriptor.value;
}

function addReason(reasons, reason) {
  if (!reasons.includes(reason)) {
    reasons.push(reason);
  }
}

function orderedReasons(reasons) {
  return FAILURE_REASONS.filter((reason) => reasons.includes(reason));
}

function isValidHash(value) {
  return typeof value === "string" && HASH_PATTERN.test(value);
}

function rawMarkerValue(value) {
  return typeof value === "string" && RAW_MARKER_PATTERN.test(value);
}

function getSafeDescriptors(value, missingReason, malformedReason) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: missingReason
    };
  }

  if (!isPlainRecord(value)) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason:
        typeof value === "function" ||
        safeIsProxy(value) ||
        objectInspectionFailed(value)
          ? "hostile-caller-object"
          : malformedReason
    };
  }

  try {
    return {
      ok: true,
      descriptors: Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value)
    };
  } catch {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "hostile-caller-object"
    };
  }
}

function isExpectedAdmissionField(fieldKey, trail) {
  if (trail.length === 0) {
    return [
      "writeintentid",
      "promotionrequestid",
      "promotionreadinessid",
      "candidateid",
      "agentcandidateid",
      "admissionorder",
      "admissionstate",
      "writeintentstatus",
      "reviewstatus",
      "admissionblockedreasons",
      "governedflowkind",
      "requestevidencehash",
      "invocationevidencehash",
      "candidatecontentfingerprint",
      "provenancestatus",
      "noncanonicalstatus",
      "authorityflags"
    ].includes(fieldKey) || ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey);
  }

  return (
    trail.length === 1 &&
    trail[0] === "authorityflags" &&
    ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedPackageField(fieldKey, trail) {
  return (
    trail.length === 0 &&
    [
      "targetpackagepath",
      "currentversionhash",
      "packagekind",
      "targetkind",
      "filecount"
    ].includes(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedRequestField(fieldKey, trail) {
  if (trail.length === 0) {
    return [
      "targetpackagepath",
      "expectedcurrentversionhash",
      "candidatecontentfingerprint",
      "candidatereplacementhash",
      "fixtureonlyoperatorreviewconfirmed",
      "authorityflags"
    ].includes(fieldKey) || TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey);
  }

  return (
    trail.length === 1 &&
    trail[0] === "authorityflags" &&
    TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedField(context, fieldKey, trail) {
  if (context === "admission") {
    return isExpectedAdmissionField(fieldKey, trail);
  }

  if (context === "package") {
    return isExpectedPackageField(fieldKey, trail);
  }

  return isExpectedRequestField(fieldKey, trail);
}

function classifyField(field, trail, context, reasons) {
  const fieldKey = normalizeFieldKey(field);

  if (isExpectedField(context, fieldKey, trail)) {
    return;
  }

  if (PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey)) {
    if (context === "package") {
      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
    } else if (context === "request") {
      addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-request");
    } else {
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
      addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    }
  }

  if (
    RAW_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_SET)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
  }

  if (CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey)) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
  }

  if (SPOOF_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) || fieldKey.includes("hash")) {
    addReason(reasons, "caller-transaction-spoof");

    if (context === "admission") {
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
    }
  }

  if (
    CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_SET)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
  }
}

function scanSafety(
  value,
  reasons,
  context,
  trail = [],
  seen = new WeakSet(),
  depth = 0,
  budget = { objectCount: 0 }
) {
  if (value === undefined) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (rawMarkerValue(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    return;
  }

  "malformed-admission-record",
  "malformed-package-record",
  "unsupported-package-record",
  "malformed-transaction-request",
  "target-package-path-mismatch",

];

function packageRecord(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    currentVersionHash: hashA,
    packageKind: "controlled-fixture-package",
    targetKind: "single-file",
    fileCount: 1,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function transactionRequest(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashA,
    candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
    candidateReplacementHash: hashB,
    fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: true,
    authorityFlags: falseAuthorityFlags,
    ...falseAuthorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function assertDeepFrozen(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function")) {
    return;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return;
  }

  seen.add(value);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(value), true, "expected deep-frozen output");

  for (const descriptor of Object.values(Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value))) {
    assert.equal(
      typeof descriptor.get,
      "undefined",
      "public output must not expose getters"
    );
    assertDeepFrozen(descriptor.value, seen);
  }
}

function assertRecordShape(record) {
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), publicRecordKeys);
  assertDeepFrozen(record);
}

function assertCommitted(
  record,
  {
    beforeVersionHash = hashA,
    afterVersionHash = hashB,
    candidateContentFingerprint = hashC
  } = {}
) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-committed");
  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "fixture-package-record-updated");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.deepEqual(record.failureReasons, []);
  assert.equal(record.targetPackagePath, CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH);
  assert.equal(record.beforeVersionHash, beforeVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.afterVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.targetVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.candidateContentFingerprint, candidateContentFingerprint);
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, true);
  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
  assert.match(record.transactionEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record.recoveryRecord), [
    "recoveryStatus",
    "beforeVersionHash",
    "afterVersionHash",
    "recoveryEvidenceHash"
  ]);
  assert.equal(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.match(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
}

function assertBlocked(record, expectedReasons) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-blocked");
  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "commit-failed");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-noop-recorded");
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, false);
  for (const reason of expectedReasons) {
    assert.equal(
      record.failureReasons.includes(reason),
      true,
      `missing failure reason ${reason}: ${record.failureReasons.join(", ")}`
    );
  }
  assert.equal(
    record.afterVersionHash === record.beforeVersionHash ||
      (record.afterVersionHash === "" && record.beforeVersionHash === ""),
    true
  );
  assert.match(record.transactionEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.match(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
}

function assertBlockedByAny(record, expectedReasons, label) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-blocked", label);
  assert.equal(
    expectedReasons.some((reason) => record.failureReasons.includes(reason)),
    true,
    `${label} missing any of ${expectedReasons.join(", ")}: ${record.failureReasons.join(", ")}`
  );
  assert.equal(JSON.stringify(record).includes("caller-owned"), false, label);
}

      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      continue;
    }

    if (rawMarkerValue(descriptor.value)) {
      addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    }
  }

  for (const key of Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors)) {
    if (typeof key === "symbol") {
      continue;
    }

    const descriptor = descriptors[key];

    if (
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      typeof descriptor.value === "function" ||
      descriptor.value === undefined
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanSafety(
      descriptor.value,
      reasons,
      context,
      [...trail, normalizeFieldKey(key)],
      seen,
      depth + 1,
      budget
    );
  }
}

function validateReasonArray(value, reasons, malformedReason) {
  if (!safeArrayIsArray(value) || safeIsProxy(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return false;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return false;
  }

  const length = descriptorValue(descriptors, "length");

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(length) || length < 0) {
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return false;
  }

  return length === 0;
}

function validateAuthorityFlags({
  descriptors,
  expectedEntries,
  reasons,
  malformedReason,
  requireNested,
  requireMirrored = false
}) {
  const authorityValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, "authorityFlags");

  if (requireNested && !isPlainRecord(authorityValue)) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return;
  }

  let authorityDescriptors;

  if (isPlainRecord(authorityValue)) {
    try {
      authorityDescriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(authorityValue);
    } catch {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      return;
    }
  }

  for (const [field, expectedValue] of expectedEntries) {
    if (authorityDescriptors) {
      const nestedValue = descriptorValue(authorityDescriptors, field);

      if (nestedValue !== expectedValue) {
        addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      }
    }

    if (requireMirrored && !Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    }

    if (Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field)) {
      const mirroredValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, field);

      if (mirroredValue !== expectedValue) {
        addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
        addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
      }
    }
  }

  if (authorityDescriptors) {
    const expectedFieldSet = new Set(expectedEntries.map(([field]) => field));
    const keys = Reflect.ownKeys(authorityDescriptors);

    if (
      keys.length !== expectedEntries.length ||
      keys.some((key) => typeof key !== "string" || !expectedFieldSet.has(key))
    ) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    }
  }
}

function validWriteIntentId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX) &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX.length))
  );
}

function validPromotionRequestId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith(REQUEST_ID_PREFIX) &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice(REQUEST_ID_PREFIX.length))
  );
}

function validPromotionReadinessId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("agent-a-promotion-readiness:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-promotion-readiness:".length))
  );
}

function validCandidateId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("candidate-staging:ai-output:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("candidate-staging:ai-output:".length))
  );
}

function validAgentCandidateId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("agent-a-candidate-generation:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-candidate-generation:".length))
  );
}

function transactionIdFor(writeIntentId) {
  return validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)
    ? `${TRANSACTION_PREFIX}${writeIntentId.slice(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX.length)}`
    : `${TRANSACTION_PREFIX}unavailable`;
}

function analyzeAdmission(admissionRecord) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    admissionRecord,
    "missing-admission-record",
    "malformed-admission-record"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      writeIntentId: "",
      promotionRequestId: "",
      candidateContentFingerprint: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const writeIntentId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "writeIntentId");
  const promotionRequestId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "promotionRequestId");
  const promotionReadinessId = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "promotionReadinessId"
  );
  const candidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId");
  const agentCandidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId");
  const admissionOrder = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionOrder");
  const admissionState = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionState");
  const writeIntentStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "writeIntentStatus");
  const reviewStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "reviewStatus");
  const blockedReasons = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionBlockedReasons");
  const governedFlowKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "governedFlowKind");
  const requestEvidenceHash = descriptorValue(descriptors, "requestEvidenceHash");
  const invocationEvidenceHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "invocationEvidenceHash"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprint = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const provenanceStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "provenanceStatus");
  const nonCanonicalStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "nonCanonicalStatus");

  if (!validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validPromotionRequestId(promotionRequestId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validPromotionReadinessId(promotionReadinessId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validCandidateId(candidateId) || !validAgentCandidateId(agentCandidateId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (
    !Number.isSafeInteger(admissionOrder) ||
    admissionOrder < 0 ||
    (validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId) &&
      writeIntentId !==
        `${WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX}${String(admissionOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(requestEvidenceHash) || !isValidHash(invocationEvidenceHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-content-fingerprint");
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (
    admissionState !== "admitted" ||
    writeIntentStatus !== "intent-recorded" ||
    reviewStatus !== "pending-review" ||
    !validateReasonArray(
      blockedReasons,
      reasons,
      "malformed-admission-record"
    )
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "admission-not-admitted");
  }

  if (
    governedFlowKind !== "agent-a-governed-canonical-write" ||
    provenanceStatus !== "reviewable-non-secret" ||
    nonCanonicalStatus !== "non-canonical"
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");

  assertBlocked(

  assertBlocked(

{
  const registry = createGovernedWriteTransactionRegistry();

  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry), true);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction), true);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry.listGovernedWriteTransactionRecords), true);

  const first = registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction(
    realAdmittedRecord(),
    packageRecord(),
    transactionRequest()
  );
  const second = registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction(
    realAdmittedRecord(8),
    packageRecord({ currentVersionHash: hashB }),
    transactionRequest({
      expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashB,
      candidateReplacementHash: hashD
    })
  );
  const listed = registry.listGovernedWriteTransactionRecords();

  assertCommitted(first);
  assertCommitted(second, { beforeVersionHash: hashB, afterVersionHash: hashD });
  assert.equal(second.transactionId, "governed-write-transaction:0008");
  assert.deepEqual(listed, [first, second]);
  assertDeepFrozen(listed);
}

function arrayDescriptorValues(value) {
  if (!safeArrayIsArray(value) || safeIsProxy(value)) {
    return null;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }

  const length = descriptorValue(descriptors, "length");

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(length) || length < 0) {
    return null;
  }

  for (const key of Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors)) {
    if (key === "length") {
      continue;
    }

    if (typeof key !== "string" || !/^(?:0|[1-9]\d*)$/u.test(key)) {
      return null;
    }

    const index = Number(key);

    if (!Number.isSafeInteger(index) || index < 0 || index >= length) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  const values = [];

  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
    const item = descriptorValue(descriptors, String(index));

    if (item === undefined) {
      return null;
    }

    values.push(item);
  }

  return values;
}

function hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field) {
  return Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field);
}

function validateUnsupportedPackagePathAliases(descriptors, reasons) {
  for (const field of [
    "targetPaths",
    "packagePaths",
    "targetPackagePaths",
    "files",
    "targetPackagePathList",
    "packagePathList",
    "adjacentFilePath",
    "targetPath",
    "packagePath"
  ]) {
    if (hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
    }
  }
}

function validateUnsupportedRequestPathAliases(descriptors, reasons) {
  for (const field of [
    "targetPaths",
    "packagePaths",
    "targetPackagePaths",
    "targetPackagePathList",
    "packagePathList",
    "adjacentFilePath",
    "targetPath",
    "packagePath",
    "files"
  ]) {
    if (hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-request");
    }
  }
}

function analyzePackageRecord(packageRecord) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    packageRecord,
    "missing-package-record",
    "malformed-package-record"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      beforeVersionHash: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const targetPackagePath = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetPackagePath");
  const currentVersionHash = descriptorValue(descriptors, "currentVersionHash");
  const packageKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "packageKind");
  const targetKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetKind");
  const fileCount = descriptorValue(descriptors, "fileCount");

  if (targetPackagePath !== CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH) {
    addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(currentVersionHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (
    !["controlled-fixture-package", "controlled-fixture"].includes(packageKind) ||
    !["single-file", "controlled-fixture-single-file"].includes(targetKind)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
  }

  if (fileCount !== undefined && fileCount !== 1) {
    addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
  }

  validateUnsupportedPackagePathAliases(descriptors, reasons);
  scanSafety(packageRecord, reasons, "package");

  return {
    reasons,
    beforeVersionHash: isValidHash(currentVersionHash) ? currentVersionHash : ""
  };
}

function transactionAuthorityEntries() {
  return TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_NAMES.map((field) => [field, false]);
}

function analyzeTransactionRequest(transactionRequest, packageAnalysis, admissionAnalysis) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    transactionRequest,
    "missing-transaction-request",
    "malformed-transaction-request"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      candidateContentFingerprint: "",
      candidateReplacementHash: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const targetPackagePath = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetPackagePath");
  const expectedCurrentVersionHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "expectedCurrentVersionHash"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprint = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const candidateReplacementHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateReplacementHash"
  );
  const fixtureReview = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed"
  );

  if (targetPackagePath !== CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH) {
    addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(expectedCurrentVersionHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateReplacementHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-content-fingerprint");
  }

  if (fixtureReview !== true) {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-fixture-only-review");
  }

  validateUnsupportedRequestPathAliases(descriptors, reasons);

  if (
    isValidHash(expectedCurrentVersionHash) &&
    packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash !== "" &&
    expectedCurrentVersionHash !== packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "stale-version-hash");
  }

  if (
    isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint) &&
    admissionAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint !== "" &&
    candidateContentFingerprint !== admissionAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
  }

  validateAuthorityFlags({
    descriptors,
    expectedEntries: transactionAuthorityEntries(),
    reasons,
    malformedReason: "malformed-transaction-request",
    requireNested: true,
    requireMirrored: true
  });
  scanSafety(transactionRequest, reasons, "request");

  return {
    reasons,
    candidateContentFingerprint: isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)
      ? candidateContentFingerprint
      : "",
    candidateReplacementHash: isValidHash(candidateReplacementHash)
      ? candidateReplacementHash
      : ""
  };
}

function canonicalJson(value) {
  if (value === null || typeof value !== "object") {
    return JSON.stringify(value);
  }

  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return `[${value.map(canonicalJson).join(",")}]`;
  }

  return `{${Object.keys(value)
    .sort()
    .map((key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${canonicalJson(value[key])}`)
    .join(",")}}`;
}

function evidenceHash(value) {
  return `sha256:${createHash("sha256").update(canonicalJson(value)).digest("hex")}`;
}

function createRecoveryRecord({
  recoveryStatus,
  beforeVersionHash,
  afterVersionHash,
  failureReasons
}) {
  const material = {
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    failureReasons
  };

  return deepFreeze({
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    recoveryEvidenceHash: evidenceHash(material)
  });
}

function createTransactionRecord({
  transactionId,
  writeIntentId,
  promotionRequestId,
  targetVersionHash,
  candidateContentFingerprint,
  transactionState,
  commitStatus,
  recoveryStatus,
  failureReasons,
  beforeVersionHash,
  afterVersionHash,
  readinessRefreshRequired
}) {
  const recoveryRecord = createRecoveryRecord({
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    failureReasons
  });
  const material = {
    transactionId,
    writeIntentId,
    promotionRequestId,
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    targetVersionHash,
    candidateContentFingerprint,
    transactionState,
    commitStatus,
    recoveryStatus,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    recoveryRecord,
    readinessRefreshRequired,
    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
  };

  return deepFreeze({
    transactionId,
    writeIntentId,
    promotionRequestId,
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    targetVersionHash,
    candidateContentFingerprint,
    transactionState,
    commitStatus,
    recoveryStatus,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    transactionEvidenceHash: evidenceHash(material),
    recoveryRecord,
    readinessRefreshRequired,
    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
  });
}

export function createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction(
  admissionRecord = undefined,
  packageRecord = undefined,
  transactionRequest = undefined
) {
  const admissionAnalysis = analyzeAdmission(admissionRecord);
  const packageAnalysis = analyzePackageRecord(packageRecord);
  const requestAnalysis = analyzeTransactionRequest(
    transactionRequest,
    packageAnalysis,
    admissionAnalysis
  );
  const failureReasons = deepFreeze(
    orderedReasons([
      ...admissionAnalysis.reasons,
      ...packageAnalysis.reasons,
      ...requestAnalysis.reasons
    ])
  );
  const committed = failureReasons.length === 0;
  const beforeVersionHash = packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash;
  const afterVersionHash = committed
    ? requestAnalysis.candidateReplacementHash
    : beforeVersionHash;
  const targetVersionHash = committed ? requestAnalysis.candidateReplacementHash : beforeVersionHash;

  return createTransactionRecord({
    transactionId: transactionIdFor(admissionAnalysis.writeIntentId),

    commitStatus: committed ? COMMITTED_STATUS : FAILED_STATUS,
    recoveryStatus: committed ? RECORDED_STATUS : NOOP_STATUS,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    readinessRefreshRequired: committed
  });
}

function validateConfinedVocabularyGroups({ errors, resolvedRoot }) {
  for (const group of CONFINED_VOCABULARY_GROUPS) {
    for (const relativePath of REQUIRED_FILES) {
      validateConfinedVocabularyGroup({
        errors,
        resolvedRoot,
        relativePath,
        group
      });
    }
  }
}

function addDuplicateEntryErrors({
  values,
  getValue = (value) => value,
  ruleId,
  messagePrefix,
  addError
}) {
  const seen = new Set();

  for (const entry of values) {
    const value = getValue(entry);
    if (typeof value !== "string" || value.length === 0) {
      continue;
    }

    if (seen.has(value)) {
      addError(ruleId, `${messagePrefix}: ${value}`, { value });
      continue;
    }

    seen.add(value);
  }
}

export function validateValidatorConfiguration({
  requiredFiles = REQUIRED_FILES,
  governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers = GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS,
  governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames =
    GOVERNED_FILES_WITHOUT_AUTHORITY_FIELD_NAMES,
  forbiddenSourcePatterns = FORBIDDEN_SOURCE_PATTERNS,
  confinedVocabularyGroups = CONFINED_VOCABULARY_GROUPS,
  addError
} = {}) {
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: requiredFiles,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-REQUIRED-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate validator required file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-BOUNDARY-MARKER",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed boundary marker file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-AUTHORITY-FIELD-SCAN-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed authority-field scan file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: forbiddenSourcePatterns,
    getValue: (pattern) => pattern.id,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-DENIED-SOURCE-PATTERN-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate denied source pattern ID",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: confinedVocabularyGroups,
    getValue: (group) => group.ruleId,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-CONFINED-VOCABULARY-GROUP-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate confined vocabulary group rule ID",
    addError
  });
}

export function validateFoundation(root = DEFAULT_ROOT) {
  const resolvedRoot = resolve(root);
  const errors = createRuleErrorCollector();

  validateValidatorConfiguration({ addError: errors.addRule });

  for (const relativePath of REQUIRED_FILES) {
    const absolutePath = join(resolvedRoot, relativePath);
    if (!existsSync(absolutePath)) {
      errors.push(`Missing required file: ${relativePath}`);
      continue;
    }

    if (!statSync(absolutePath).isFile()) {
      errors.push(`Required path is not a file: ${relativePath}`);
    }
  }

  validateGovernedFileCoverage({
    root: resolvedRoot,
    classifiedFiles: REQUIRED_FILES,
    sourceBoundaryMarkerFiles: GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS,
    addError: errors.addRule
  });

  for (const relativePath of FORBIDDEN_ARTIFACT_PATHS) {
    if (existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, relativePath))) {
      errors.push(`Forbidden generated/dependency artifact exists: ${relativePath}`);
    }
  }

  if (existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, "package.json"))) {
    try {
      const packageJson = JSON.parse(readText(resolvedRoot, "package.json"));

      if (packageJson.name !== "kuronode-v2") {
        errors.push('package.json must define name "kuronode-v2"');
      }

      if (packageJson.private !== true) {
        errors.push("package.json must define private true");
      }

      if (packageJson.type !== "module") {
        errors.push('package.json must define type "module"');
      }

      for (const [scriptName, expectedCommand] of Object.entries(EXACT_SCRIPTS)) {
        if (packageJson.scripts?.[scriptName] !== expectedCommand) {
          errors.push(`package.json script ${scriptName} must be "${expectedCommand}"`);
        }
      }

      for (const dependencyField of ["dependencies", "devDependencies"]) {
        if (hasOwnNonEmptyObject(packageJson[dependencyField])) {
          errors.push(`package.json must not declare ${dependencyField} in K2-019`);
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      errors.push(`package.json must be valid JSON: ${error.message}`);
    }
  }

  for (const relativePath of GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS) {
    if (!existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, relativePath))) {
      continue;
    }

    const text = readText(resolvedRoot, relativePath);
    if (!text.includes("NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001")) {
      errors.push(`Missing no-product-behavior marker in ${relativePath}`);
    }

    for (const {
      id,
      label,
      pattern,
      allowedFiles = [],
      allowedMatches = {}
    } of FORBIDDEN_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {
      if (allowedFiles.includes(relativePath)) {
        continue;
      }

      if (
        pattern.test(
          stripAllowedSourceMatches(text, relativePath, allowedMatches)
        )
      ) {
        errors.addRule(
          id,
          `Forbidden ${label} found in ${relativePath}`,
          { relativePath, label }
        );
      }
    }
  }

  for (const relativePath of GOVERNED_FILES_WITHOUT_AUTHORITY_FIELD_NAMES) {
    if (!existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, relativePath))) {
      continue;
    }

    const text = readText(resolvedRoot, relativePath);

    for (const fieldName of DENIED_AUTHORITY_FIELD_NAMES) {
      const authorityFieldPattern = new RegExp(
        String.raw`\breadonly\s+${fieldName}\b|\b${fieldName}\s*:|\.${fieldName}\b|["']${fieldName}["']\s*:`,
        "u"
      );

      if (authorityFieldPattern.test(text)) {
        errors.push(
          `Forbidden raw authority field ${fieldName} found in ${relativePath}`
        );
      }
    }
  }

  const v1Marker = ["Kuronode", "-v1"].join("");
  for (const relativePath of REQUIRED_FILES) {
    if (!existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, relativePath))) {
      continue;
    }

    const text = readText(resolvedRoot, relativePath);

    if (text.includes(v1Marker)) {
      errors.push(`Forbidden V1 copy-through marker found in ${relativePath}`);
    }
  }

  validateConfinedVocabularyGroups({ errors, resolvedRoot });

  if (existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, "src/shared/status-capability.mjs"))) {

} from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-request.mjs";

  createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord
} from "../src/shared/agent-a-write-admission.mjs";

const root = resolve(fileURLToPath(new URL("..", import.meta.url)));
const modulePath = join(root, "src/shared/governed-write-transaction.mjs");

const hashA = `sha256:${"a".repeat(64)}`;
const hashB = `sha256:${"b".repeat(64)}`;
const hashC = `sha256:${"c".repeat(64)}`;
const hashD = `sha256:${"d".repeat(64)}`;

const publicRecordKeys = [
  "transactionId",

};

  candidateSeparateFromCanonicalSource: true,
  canonicalSourceMutationAllowed: false,
  canonicalMutationAllowed: false,
  candidatePromotionAuthorized: false,
  externalEditAdoptionAllowed: false,
  governedImportRequired: true,
  aiAuthorityMetadataAccepted: false,
  rawCandidateContentRetained: false,
  filesystemPathRetained: false
};

function acceptedEvidence(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
    agentRole: "agent-a",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
    contentFingerprint: hashC,
    boundedEvidence: "present",
    sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary",
    ...overrides
  };
}

function acceptedCandidate(order = 4, evidenceOverrides = {}) {
  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
    acceptedEvidence(evidenceOverrides),
    order
  );
}

function readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder = 2) {
  return createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);
}

function readyPromotionRequest(
  candidateOrder = 4,
  readinessOrder = 2,
  requestOrder = 7
) {
  const candidate = acceptedCandidate(candidateOrder);
  const readiness = readyDisposition(candidate, readinessOrder);

  return createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(candidate, readiness, requestOrder);
}

function invocationEvidence(request, overrides = {}) {
  const authorityFlags = {
    ...request.authorityFlags
  };

  return {
    governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
    invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
    mutationMode: "non-mutating",
    effect: "status-only",
    providerStatus: "not-called",
    operatorReviewRequired: true,
    promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
    promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
    candidateId: request.candidateId,
    agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
    candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
    authorityFlags,
    ...authorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function realAdmittedRecord(admissionOrder = 7, overrides = {}) {
  const request = readyPromotionRequest(4, 2, 7);
  const admission = createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
    request,
    invocationEvidence(request),
    admissionOrder
  );

  assert.equal(admission.admissionState, "admitted");
  assert.deepEqual(admission.admissionBlockedReasons, []);

  return {
    ...admission,
    authorityFlags: {
      ...admission.authorityFlags
    },
    admissionBlockedReasons: [...admission.admissionBlockedReasons],
    ...overrides
  };
}

function admittedRecord(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    writeIntentId: "agent-a-write-intent:0007",
    promotionRequestId: "agent-a-promotion-request:0007",
    admissionState: "admitted",
    writeIntentStatus: "intent-recorded",
    reviewStatus: "pending-review",
    admissionBlockedReasons: [],
    candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
    authorityFlags: admissionAuthorityFlags,
    ...admissionAuthorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

const RAW_FIELD_SET = new Set(RAW_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts));
const SPOOF_FIELD_SET = new Set(SPOOF_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts));
const CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_SET = new Set(
  PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_SET = Object.freeze(
  DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_SET = Object.freeze(
  DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_PARTS.map(normalizedParts)
);
const ADMISSION_FLAG_SET = new Set(
  ADMISSION_FLAG_ENTRIES.map(([field]) => normalizeFieldKey(field))
);
const TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET = new Set(
  TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_NAMES.map(normalizeFieldKey)
);

function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (
    !value ||
    (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function") ||
    Object.isFrozen(value)
  ) {
    return value;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  seen.add(value);

  for (const descriptor of Object.values(Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value))) {
    if ("value" in descriptor) {
      deepFreeze(descriptor.value, seen);
    }
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

function normalizedParts(parts) {
  return normalizeFieldKey(parts.join(""));
}

function normalizeFieldKey(field) {
  return typeof field === "string"
    ? field.replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/giu, "").toLowerCase()
    : "";
}

function fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, substrings) {
  return substrings.some((substring) => fieldKey.includes(substring));
}

function safeIsProxy(value) {
  try {
    return nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value);
  } catch {
    return true;
  }
}

function safeArrayIsArray(value) {
  try {
    return Array.isArray(value);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function objectInspectionFailed(value) {
  try {
    Array.isArray(value);
    Object.getPrototypeOf(value);
    return false;
  } catch {
    return true;
  }
}

function isPlainRecord(value) {
  if (
    !value ||
    typeof value !== "object" ||
    safeIsProxy(value) ||
    safeArrayIsArray(value)
  ) {
    return false;
  }

  try {
    const prototype = Object.getPrototypeOf(value);

    return prototype === Object.prototype || prototype === null;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) {
  return (
    typeof descriptor?.get === "function" ||
    typeof descriptor?.set === "function"
  );
}

function descriptorValue(descriptors, field) {
  const descriptor = descriptors[field];

  if (!descriptor || hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor)) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return descriptor.value;
}

function addReason(reasons, reason) {
  if (!reasons.includes(reason)) {
    reasons.push(reason);
  }
}

function orderedReasons(reasons) {
  return FAILURE_REASONS.filter((reason) => reasons.includes(reason));
}

function isValidHash(value) {
  return typeof value === "string" && HASH_PATTERN.test(value);
}

function rawMarkerValue(value) {
  return typeof value === "string" && RAW_MARKER_PATTERN.test(value);
}

function getSafeDescriptors(value, missingReason, malformedReason) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: missingReason
    };
  }

  if (!isPlainRecord(value)) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason:
        typeof value === "function" ||
        safeIsProxy(value) ||
        objectInspectionFailed(value)
          ? "hostile-caller-object"
          : malformedReason
    };
  }

  try {
    return {
      ok: true,
      descriptors: Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value)
    };
  } catch {
    return {
      ok: false,
      reason: "hostile-caller-object"
    };
  }
}

function isExpectedAdmissionField(fieldKey, trail) {
  if (trail.length === 0) {
    return [
      "writeintentid",
      "promotionrequestid",
      "promotionreadinessid",
      "candidateid",
      "agentcandidateid",
      "admissionorder",
      "admissionstate",
      "writeintentstatus",
      "reviewstatus",
      "admissionblockedreasons",
      "governedflowkind",
      "requestevidencehash",
      "invocationevidencehash",
      "candidatecontentfingerprint",
      "provenancestatus",
      "noncanonicalstatus",
      "authorityflags"
    ].includes(fieldKey) || ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey);
  }

  return (
    trail.length === 1 &&
    trail[0] === "authorityflags" &&
    ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedPackageField(fieldKey, trail) {
  return (
    trail.length === 0 &&
    [
      "targetpackagepath",
      "currentversionhash",
      "packagekind",
      "targetkind",
      "filecount"
    ].includes(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedRequestField(fieldKey, trail) {
  if (trail.length === 0) {
    return [
      "targetpackagepath",
      "expectedcurrentversionhash",
      "candidatecontentfingerprint",
      "candidatereplacementhash",
      "fixtureonlyoperatorreviewconfirmed",
      "authorityflags"
    ].includes(fieldKey) || TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey);
  }

  return (
    trail.length === 1 &&
    trail[0] === "authorityflags" &&
    TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey)
  );
}

function isExpectedField(context, fieldKey, trail) {
  if (context === "admission") {
    return isExpectedAdmissionField(fieldKey, trail);
  }

  if (context === "package") {
    return isExpectedPackageField(fieldKey, trail);
  }

  return isExpectedRequestField(fieldKey, trail);
}

function classifyField(field, trail, context, reasons) {
  const fieldKey = normalizeFieldKey(field);

  if (isExpectedField(context, fieldKey, trail)) {
    return;
  }

  if (PATH_ALIAS_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey)) {
    if (context === "package") {
      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
    } else if (context === "request") {
      addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-request");
    } else {
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
      addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    }
  }

  if (
    RAW_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, DANGEROUS_RAW_SUBSTRING_SET)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
  }

  if (CALLER_HANDLE_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey)) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
  }

  if (SPOOF_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) || fieldKey.includes("hash")) {
    addReason(reasons, "caller-transaction-spoof");

    if (context === "admission") {
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
    }
  }

  if (
    CONTRADICTORY_FIELD_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    ADMISSION_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_SET.has(fieldKey) ||
    fieldKeyIncludesAny(fieldKey, DANGEROUS_AUTHORITY_SUBSTRING_SET)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
  }
}

function scanSafety(
  value,
  reasons,
  context,
  trail = [],
  seen = new WeakSet(),
  depth = 0,
  budget = { objectCount: 0 }
) {
  if (value === undefined) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (rawMarkerValue(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    return;
  }

function packageRecord(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    currentVersionHash: hashA,
    packageKind: "controlled-fixture-package",
    targetKind: "single-file",
    fileCount: 1,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function transactionRequest(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashA,
    candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
    candidateReplacementHash: hashB,
    fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: true,
    authorityFlags: falseAuthorityFlags,
    ...falseAuthorityFlags,
    ...overrides
  };
}

function assertDeepFrozen(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function")) {
    return;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return;
  }

  seen.add(value);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(value), true, "expected deep-frozen output");

  for (const descriptor of Object.values(Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value))) {
    assert.equal(
      typeof descriptor.get,
      "undefined",
      "public output must not expose getters"
    );
    assertDeepFrozen(descriptor.value, seen);
  }
}

function assertRecordShape(record) {
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), publicRecordKeys);
  assertDeepFrozen(record);
}

function assertCommitted(
  record,
  {
    beforeVersionHash = hashA,
    afterVersionHash = hashB,
    candidateContentFingerprint = hashC
  } = {}
) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-committed");
  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "fixture-package-record-updated");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.deepEqual(record.failureReasons, []);
  assert.equal(record.targetPackagePath, CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH);
  assert.equal(record.beforeVersionHash, beforeVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.afterVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.targetVersionHash, afterVersionHash);
  assert.equal(record.candidateContentFingerprint, candidateContentFingerprint);
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, true);
  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
  assert.match(record.transactionEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record.recoveryRecord), [
    "recoveryStatus",
    "beforeVersionHash",
    "afterVersionHash",
    "recoveryEvidenceHash"
  ]);
  assert.equal(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryStatus, "recovery-recorded");
  assert.match(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
}

function assertBlocked(record, expectedReasons) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-blocked");
  assert.equal(record.commitStatus, "commit-failed");
  assert.equal(record.recoveryStatus, "recovery-noop-recorded");
  assert.equal(record.readinessRefreshRequired, false);
  for (const reason of expectedReasons) {
    assert.equal(
      record.failureReasons.includes(reason),
      true,
      `missing failure reason ${reason}: ${record.failureReasons.join(", ")}`
    );
  }
  assert.equal(
    record.afterVersionHash === record.beforeVersionHash ||
      (record.afterVersionHash === "" && record.beforeVersionHash === ""),
    true
  );
  assert.match(record.transactionEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
  assert.match(record.recoveryRecord.recoveryEvidenceHash, /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
}

function assertBlockedByAny(record, expectedReasons, label) {
  assertRecordShape(record);
  assert.equal(record.transactionState, "transaction-blocked", label);
  assert.equal(
    expectedReasons.some((reason) => record.failureReasons.includes(reason)),
    true,
    `${label} missing any of ${expectedReasons.join(", ")}: ${record.failureReasons.join(", ")}`
  );
  assert.equal(JSON.stringify(record).includes("caller-owned"), false, label);
}

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    }

    return;
  }

  if (
    typeof value === "bigint" ||
    typeof value === "symbol" ||
    typeof value === "function"
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
    return;
  }

  if (safeIsProxy(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (!safeArrayIsArray(value) && !isPlainRecord(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (depth > SCAN_BOUNDS.maxDepth) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return;
  }

  seen.add(value);
  budget.objectCount += 1;

  if (budget.objectCount > SCAN_BOUNDS.maxObjectCount) {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return;
  }

  for (const key of Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors)) {
    if (typeof key === "symbol") {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      continue;
    }

    const descriptor = descriptors[key];

    classifyField(key, trail, context, reasons);

    if (hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor)) {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      continue;
    }

    if (typeof descriptor.value === "function") {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      continue;
    }

    if (descriptor.value === undefined) {
      if (!isExpectedField(context, normalizeFieldKey(key), trail)) {
        addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      }

      continue;
    }

    if (
      typeof descriptor.value === "symbol" ||
      typeof descriptor.value === "bigint"
    ) {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      continue;
    }

    if (rawMarkerValue(descriptor.value)) {
      addReason(reasons, "raw-marker-present");
    }
  }

  for (const key of Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors)) {
    if (typeof key === "symbol") {
      continue;
    }

    const descriptor = descriptors[key];

    if (
      hasAccessorDescriptor(descriptor) ||
      typeof descriptor.value === "function" ||
      descriptor.value === undefined
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    scanSafety(
      descriptor.value,
      reasons,
      context,
      [...trail, normalizeFieldKey(key)],
      seen,
      depth + 1,
      budget
    );
  }
}

function validateReasonArray(value, reasons, malformedReason) {
  if (!safeArrayIsArray(value) || safeIsProxy(value)) {
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return false;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
    return false;
  }

  const length = descriptorValue(descriptors, "length");

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(length) || length < 0) {
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return false;
  }

  return length === 0;
}

function validateAuthorityFlags({
  descriptors,
  expectedEntries,
  reasons,
  malformedReason,
  requireNested,
  requireMirrored = false
}) {
  const authorityValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, "authorityFlags");

  if (requireNested && !isPlainRecord(authorityValue)) {
    addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    return;
  }

  let authorityDescriptors;

  if (isPlainRecord(authorityValue)) {
    try {
      authorityDescriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(authorityValue);
    } catch {
      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
      return;
    }
  }

  for (const [field, expectedValue] of expectedEntries) {
    if (authorityDescriptors) {
      const nestedValue = descriptorValue(authorityDescriptors, field);

      if (nestedValue !== expectedValue) {
        addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      }
    }

    if (requireMirrored && !Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
      addReason(reasons, malformedReason);
    }

    if (Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field)) {
      const mirroredValue = descriptorValue(descriptors, field);

      if (mirroredValue !== expectedValue) {
        addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
        addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
      }
    }
  }

  if (authorityDescriptors) {
    const expectedFieldSet = new Set(expectedEntries.map(([field]) => field));
    const keys = Reflect.ownKeys(authorityDescriptors);

    if (
      keys.length !== expectedEntries.length ||
      keys.some((key) => typeof key !== "string" || !expectedFieldSet.has(key))
    ) {
      addReason(reasons, "permissive-authority-flags");
    }
  }
}

function validWriteIntentId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX) &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX.length))
  );
}

function validPromotionRequestId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith(REQUEST_ID_PREFIX) &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice(REQUEST_ID_PREFIX.length))
  );
}

function validPromotionReadinessId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("agent-a-promotion-readiness:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-promotion-readiness:".length))
  );
}

function validCandidateId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("candidate-staging:ai-output:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("candidate-staging:ai-output:".length))
  );
}

function validAgentCandidateId(value) {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" &&
    value.startsWith("agent-a-candidate-generation:") &&
    /^\d{4}$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-candidate-generation:".length))
  );
}

function transactionIdFor(writeIntentId) {
  return validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)
    ? `${TRANSACTION_PREFIX}${writeIntentId.slice(WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX.length)}`
    : `${TRANSACTION_PREFIX}unavailable`;
}

function analyzeAdmission(admissionRecord) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    admissionRecord,
    "missing-admission-record",
    "malformed-admission-record"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      writeIntentId: "",
      promotionRequestId: "",
      candidateContentFingerprint: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const writeIntentId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "writeIntentId");
  const promotionRequestId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "promotionRequestId");
  const promotionReadinessId = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "promotionReadinessId"
  );
  const candidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "candidateId");
  const agentCandidateId = descriptorValue(descriptors, "agentCandidateId");
  const admissionOrder = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionOrder");
  const admissionState = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionState");
  const writeIntentStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "writeIntentStatus");
  const reviewStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "reviewStatus");
  const blockedReasons = descriptorValue(descriptors, "admissionBlockedReasons");
  const governedFlowKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "governedFlowKind");
  const requestEvidenceHash = descriptorValue(descriptors, "requestEvidenceHash");
  const invocationEvidenceHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "invocationEvidenceHash"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprint = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const provenanceStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "provenanceStatus");
  const nonCanonicalStatus = descriptorValue(descriptors, "nonCanonicalStatus");

  if (!validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validPromotionRequestId(promotionRequestId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validPromotionReadinessId(promotionReadinessId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!validCandidateId(candidateId) || !validAgentCandidateId(agentCandidateId)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (
    !Number.isSafeInteger(admissionOrder) ||
    admissionOrder < 0 ||
    (validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId) &&
      writeIntentId !==
        `${WRITE_INTENT_PREFIX}${String(admissionOrder).padStart(4, "0")}`)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(requestEvidenceHash) || !isValidHash(invocationEvidenceHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-content-fingerprint");
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");
  }

  if (
    admissionState !== "admitted" ||
    writeIntentStatus !== "intent-recorded" ||
    reviewStatus !== "pending-review" ||
    !validateReasonArray(
      blockedReasons,
      reasons,
      "malformed-admission-record"
    )
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "admission-not-admitted");
  }

  if (
    governedFlowKind !== "agent-a-governed-canonical-write" ||
    provenanceStatus !== "reviewable-non-secret" ||
    nonCanonicalStatus !== "non-canonical"
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-admission-record");

{
  const registry = createGovernedWriteTransactionRegistry();

  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry), true);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction), true);
  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(registry.listGovernedWriteTransactionRecords), true);

  const first = registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction(
    realAdmittedRecord(),
    packageRecord(),
    transactionRequest()
  );
  const second = registry.registerGovernedWriteTransaction(
    realAdmittedRecord(8),
    packageRecord({ currentVersionHash: hashB }),
    transactionRequest({
      expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashB,
      candidateReplacementHash: hashD
    })
  );
  const listed = registry.listGovernedWriteTransactionRecords();

  assertCommitted(first);
  assertCommitted(second, { beforeVersionHash: hashB, afterVersionHash: hashD });
  assert.equal(second.transactionId, "governed-write-transaction:0008");
  assert.deepEqual(listed, [first, second]);
  assertDeepFrozen(listed);
}

function arrayDescriptorValues(value) {
  if (!safeArrayIsArray(value) || safeIsProxy(value)) {
    return null;
  }

  let descriptors;

  try {
    descriptors = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }

  const length = descriptorValue(descriptors, "length");

  if (!Number.isSafeInteger(length) || length < 0) {
    return null;
  }

  for (const key of Reflect.ownKeys(descriptors)) {
    if (key === "length") {
      continue;
    }

    if (typeof key !== "string" || !/^(?:0|[1-9]\d*)$/u.test(key)) {
      return null;
    }

    const index = Number(key);

    if (!Number.isSafeInteger(index) || index < 0 || index >= length) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  const values = [];

  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
    const item = descriptorValue(descriptors, String(index));

    if (item === undefined) {
      return null;
    }

    values.push(item);
  }

  return values;
}

function hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field) {
  return Object.hasOwn(descriptors, field);
}

function validateUnsupportedPackagePathAliases(descriptors, reasons) {
  for (const field of [
    "targetPaths",
    "packagePaths",
    "targetPackagePaths",
    "files",
    "targetPackagePathList",
    "packagePathList",
    "adjacentFilePath",
    "targetPath",
    "packagePath"
  ]) {
    if (hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
    }
  }
}

function validateUnsupportedRequestPathAliases(descriptors, reasons) {
  for (const field of [
    "targetPaths",
    "packagePaths",
    "targetPackagePaths",
    "targetPackagePathList",
    "packagePathList",
    "adjacentFilePath",
    "targetPath",
    "packagePath",
    "files"
  ]) {
    if (hasOwnDescriptor(descriptors, field)) {
      addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
      addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-request");
    }
  }
}

function analyzePackageRecord(packageRecord) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    packageRecord,
    "missing-package-record",
    "malformed-package-record"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      beforeVersionHash: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const targetPackagePath = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetPackagePath");
  const currentVersionHash = descriptorValue(descriptors, "currentVersionHash");
  const packageKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "packageKind");
  const targetKind = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetKind");
  const fileCount = descriptorValue(descriptors, "fileCount");

  if (targetPackagePath !== CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH) {
    addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(currentVersionHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (
    !["controlled-fixture-package", "controlled-fixture"].includes(packageKind) ||
    !["single-file", "controlled-fixture-single-file"].includes(targetKind)
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
  }

  if (fileCount !== undefined && fileCount !== 1) {
    addReason(reasons, "unsupported-package-record");
  }

  validateUnsupportedPackagePathAliases(descriptors, reasons);
  scanSafety(packageRecord, reasons, "package");

  return {
    reasons,
    beforeVersionHash: isValidHash(currentVersionHash) ? currentVersionHash : ""
  };
}

function transactionAuthorityEntries() {
  return TRANSACTION_AUTHORITY_FLAG_NAMES.map((field) => [field, false]);
}

function analyzeTransactionRequest(transactionRequest, packageAnalysis, admissionAnalysis) {
  const reasons = [];
  const descriptorResult = getSafeDescriptors(
    transactionRequest,
    "missing-transaction-request",
    "malformed-transaction-request"
  );

  if (!descriptorResult.ok) {
    addReason(reasons, descriptorResult.reason);
    return {
      reasons,
      candidateContentFingerprint: "",
      candidateReplacementHash: ""
    };
  }

  const { descriptors } = descriptorResult;
  const targetPackagePath = descriptorValue(descriptors, "targetPackagePath");
  const expectedCurrentVersionHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "expectedCurrentVersionHash"
  );
  const candidateContentFingerprint = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateContentFingerprint"
  );
  const candidateReplacementHash = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "candidateReplacementHash"
  );
  const fixtureReview = descriptorValue(
    descriptors,
    "fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed"
  );

  if (targetPackagePath !== CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH) {
    addReason(reasons, "target-package-path-mismatch");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(expectedCurrentVersionHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateReplacementHash)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-version-hash");
  }

  if (!isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
    addReason(reasons, "malformed-content-fingerprint");
  }

  if (fixtureReview !== true) {
    addReason(reasons, "missing-fixture-only-review");
  }

  validateUnsupportedRequestPathAliases(descriptors, reasons);

  if (
    isValidHash(expectedCurrentVersionHash) &&
    packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash !== "" &&
    expectedCurrentVersionHash !== packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "stale-version-hash");
  }

  if (
    isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint) &&
    admissionAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint !== "" &&
    candidateContentFingerprint !== admissionAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint
  ) {
    addReason(reasons, "contradictory-transaction-metadata");
  }

  validateAuthorityFlags({
    descriptors,
    expectedEntries: transactionAuthorityEntries(),
    reasons,
    malformedReason: "malformed-transaction-request",
    requireNested: true,
    requireMirrored: true
  });
  scanSafety(transactionRequest, reasons, "request");

  return {
    reasons,
    candidateContentFingerprint: isValidHash(candidateContentFingerprint)
      ? candidateContentFingerprint
      : "",
    candidateReplacementHash: isValidHash(candidateReplacementHash)
      ? candidateReplacementHash
      : ""
  };
}

function canonicalJson(value) {
  if (value === null || typeof value !== "object") {
    return JSON.stringify(value);
  }

  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return `[${value.map(canonicalJson).join(",")}]`;
  }

  return `{${Object.keys(value)
    .sort()
    .map((key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${canonicalJson(value[key])}`)
    .join(",")}}`;
}

function evidenceHash(value) {
  return `sha256:${createHash("sha256").update(canonicalJson(value)).digest("hex")}`;
}

function createRecoveryRecord({
  recoveryStatus,
  beforeVersionHash,
  afterVersionHash,
  failureReasons
}) {
  const material = {
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    failureReasons
  };

  return deepFreeze({
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    recoveryEvidenceHash: evidenceHash(material)
  });
}

function createTransactionRecord({
  transactionId,
  writeIntentId,
  promotionRequestId,
  targetVersionHash,
  candidateContentFingerprint,
  transactionState,
  commitStatus,
  recoveryStatus,
  failureReasons,
  beforeVersionHash,
  afterVersionHash,
  readinessRefreshRequired
}) {
  const recoveryRecord = createRecoveryRecord({
    recoveryStatus,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    failureReasons
  });
  const material = {
    transactionId,
    writeIntentId,
    promotionRequestId,
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    targetVersionHash,
    candidateContentFingerprint,
    transactionState,
    commitStatus,
    recoveryStatus,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    recoveryRecord,
    readinessRefreshRequired,
    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
  };

  return deepFreeze({
    transactionId,
    writeIntentId,
    promotionRequestId,
    targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
    targetVersionHash,
    candidateContentFingerprint,
    transactionState,
    commitStatus,
    recoveryStatus,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    transactionEvidenceHash: evidenceHash(material),
    recoveryRecord,
    readinessRefreshRequired,
    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
  });
}

export function createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction(
  admissionRecord = undefined,
  packageRecord = undefined,
  transactionRequest = undefined
) {
  const admissionAnalysis = analyzeAdmission(admissionRecord);
  const packageAnalysis = analyzePackageRecord(packageRecord);
  const requestAnalysis = analyzeTransactionRequest(
    transactionRequest,
    packageAnalysis,
    admissionAnalysis
  );
  const failureReasons = deepFreeze(
    orderedReasons([
      ...admissionAnalysis.reasons,
      ...packageAnalysis.reasons,
      ...requestAnalysis.reasons
    ])
  );
  const committed = failureReasons.length === 0;
  const beforeVersionHash = packageAnalysis.beforeVersionHash;
  const afterVersionHash = committed
    ? requestAnalysis.candidateReplacementHash
    : beforeVersionHash;
  const targetVersionHash = committed ? requestAnalysis.candidateReplacementHash : beforeVersionHash;

  return createTransactionRecord({
    transactionId: transactionIdFor(admissionAnalysis.writeIntentId),
    writeIntentId: admissionAnalysis.writeIntentId,
    promotionRequestId: admissionAnalysis.promotionRequestId,
    targetVersionHash,
    candidateContentFingerprint: requestAnalysis.candidateContentFingerprint,
    transactionState: committed ? COMMITTED_STATE : BLOCKED_STATE,
    commitStatus: committed ? COMMITTED_STATUS : FAILED_STATUS,
    recoveryStatus: committed ? RECORDED_STATUS : NOOP_STATUS,
    failureReasons,
    beforeVersionHash,
    afterVersionHash,
    readinessRefreshRequired: committed
  });
}

export function createGovernedWriteTransactionRegistry() {

  ) => {
